hooks.command: [ "$(git branch --show-current)" != "main" ] || { echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Create a feature branch first."}' >&2; exit 2; }
FILE=$(echo $TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE" in *.py) ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0
echo '[LucidShark] Code modified — scan before completing task (mcp__lucidshark__scan or lucidshark scan --fix --format ai)'
